description: Explicit oversized-file debt for scripts/hobit/check-line-counts.mjs. Guard mode allows these files only while they stay at or below currentLineCount. Do not add source globs.

files.reason: Queue capability behavior tests are concentrated in one frontend test module.
files.plannedRefactorBlock: Priority B - split Queue capability tests by contract, validation, and action family.
files.removeAfter: Remove after capability tests are split into focused files below the test threshold.

files.reason: Queue workflow runner combines workflow state transitions, command sequencing, dependency handling, and report assembly.
files.plannedRefactorBlock: Priority A - split Queue workflow runner by state machine, command execution, worker evidence, and reporting boundaries.
files.removeAfter: Remove after runner ownership is split and the remaining facade stays below the source threshold.

files.reason: Queue workflow resume owns too much continuation, action-ledger, report, and resume-planning behavior in one backend module.
files.plannedRefactorBlock: Priority A - split resume planning, action ledger reads, report assembly, and resume command ownership.
files.removeAfter: Remove after backend resume ownership is split into focused modules below the source threshold.

files.reason: Shared component CSS accumulated multiple unrelated surface families.
files.plannedRefactorBlock: Priority D - split shared component CSS by design-system ownership without visual changes.
files.removeAfter: Remove after shared component styles are split below the style threshold.

files.reason: Workspace Agent broker continuation combines protocol recovery, action replay, continuation mapping, and status derivation.
files.plannedRefactorBlock: Priority B - split broker continuation by protocol model, resume mapping, and status projection.
files.removeAfter: Remove after continuation responsibilities move into focused modules below the source threshold.

files.reason: Broker continuation tests cover multiple continuation paths in one file.
files.plannedRefactorBlock: Priority B - split broker continuation tests by protocol recovery, action replay, and status projection.
files.removeAfter: Remove after tests are split below the test threshold.

files.plannedRefactorBlock: Priority A - split worker-evidence domain ownership from workflow orchestration.
files.removeAfter: Remove after worker-evidence concerns are split below the source threshold.

files.reason: Queue workflow runner tests cover multiple runner phases in one frontend test module.
files.plannedRefactorBlock: Priority A - split runner tests by lifecycle phase, dependencies, evidence, and report output.
files.removeAfter: Remove after runner tests are split below the test threshold.

files.removeAfter: Remove after Finder component ownership is split below the source threshold.

files.reason: Queue capability implementation combines validation, command execution, and protocol response shaping.

files.removeAfter: Remove after capability implementation is split below the source threshold.

files.reason: Queue styles are concentrated in one legacy stylesheet.

files.removeAfter: Remove after Queue styles are split below the style threshold.
